data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Guide assignment' within the context of the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only two customers have booked, which does not meet the minimum requirement of four participants needed to run the tour. This leads to a clear gap in fulfilling the requirement as there is no evidence of guide assignment being applicable when the minimum participant threshold is not met.
gaps: Guide assignment cannot be validated as the minimum participant requirement of 4 people is not satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the guide assignment requirement.
